title: Job Opening Teacher at Delhi University

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at Delhi University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Delhi University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Ranchi-based team.

About Delhi University:
Delhi University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhi University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
